case_title: THO QUANG LE VS. SUZANNE KIM TAVIANSKY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF THO QUANG LE, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPERTER LINH T. MUSFELT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUZANNE KIM TAVIANSKY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
